name: Create Work Order
description: Asset Engineer creates a work order for planned maintenance or corrective repair in SAP AM.

name: Update Asset Register
description: Update asset master data in SAP AM following inspection or replacement.

name: Schedule Preventive Maintenance
description: Generate and schedule preventive maintenance plans based on asset age and condition.

name: Generate Customer Invoice
description: Generate monthly invoices based on meter reads and tariff structures.

name: Process Payment
description: Record and reconcile customer payments against outstanding invoices.

name: Detect Outage via ADMS
description: ADMS detects a fault event from network telemetry and alerts the Network Controller.

name: Dispatch Crew
description: Network Controller dispatches the nearest available field crew to the outage location.

name: Restore Supply
description: Field crew isolates the fault, restores supply, and records actions in ADMS and SAP AM.

name: Notify Customers
description: CRM sends proactive outage notifications to affected customers via SMS and email.

name: Receive Materials
description: Warehouse Operator receives incoming materials against purchase orders in WMS.

name: Issue Materials to Work Order
description: Pick and issue materials from inventory against a work order request.

name: Conduct Inventory Count
description: Perform periodic cycle counts and reconcile inventory variances in WMS.

name: Post Journal Entry
description: Post financial journal entries for asset depreciation, materials consumption, and billing revenue.

name: Run Month-End Close
description: Execute month-end financial close procedures and generate management reports.

name: Post Open Position
description: HR Coordinator creates and publishes open job positions in SAP HR.

name: Process Payroll
description: Process monthly payroll including timesheets, deductions, and bank file generation.

name: Create Customer Account
description: Register a new customer account with premise details and connection information.

name: Update Customer Details
description: Update customer contact information, billing preferences, or premise details.
